---
title: "R Notebook"
output: html_notebook
---

This is an [R Markdown](http://rmarkdown.rstudio.com) Notebook. When you execute code within the notebook, the results appear beneath the code. 

Try executing this chunk by clicking the *Run* button within the chunk or by placing your cursor inside it and pressing *Ctrl+Shift+Enter*. 

```{r}
install.packages(c("png", "grid", "gridExtra"))
library(png)
library(grid)
library(gridExtra)


```

```{r}
# Read all PNG files

##files <- list.files(path = "./figures", pattern = "^HIST_.*\\.png$", full.names = TRUE)


files <- c("./figures/HIST_ROOT_AREA_LTP_PM_2025.png",
           "./figures/HIST_ROOT_AREA_LTP_SG_2024.png",
                "./figures/HIST_ROOT_SHOOT_LTP_PM_2025.png",
                "./figures/HIST_ROOT_SHOOT_LTP_SG_2024.png",
                "./figures/HIST_SLOPE_TRrate_ETREF_LTP_PM_2025.png",
                "./figures/HIST_SLOPE_TRrate_ETREF_LTP_SG_2024.png",
                "./figures/HIST_TE_LYSI_PM_2025.png",
                "./figures/HIST_TE_LYSI_SG_2024.png",
                "./figures/HIST_SLOPE_TR_ETREF_KC_LYSI_PM_2025.png",
                "./figures/HIST_SLOPE_TR_ETREF_KC_LYSI_SG_2024.png",
                "./figures/HIST_SLOPE_TR_ETREF_HTP_SG_2023.png")
                
                

files <- sort(files)

plots <- lapply(files, function(f) {
  img <- readPNG(f)
  rasterGrob(img, interpolate = TRUE)
})

# Sort files alphabetically (optional, ensures consistent order)

```
# 
# -------------------------------
# Step 2: Add labels A, B, C... to each plot
# -------------------------------

```{r}

# Create a function to overlay label on a plot
add_label <- function(grob, label) {
  # Overlay text in top-left corner
  grobTree(
    grob,
    textGrob(label, x = 0.02, y = 0.98, just = c("left", "top"),
             gp = gpar(fontsize = 18, fontface = "bold", col = "black"))
  )
}



# Labels: A, B, C, ...
labels <- LETTERS[1:length(plots)]
plots_labeled <- mapply(add_label, plots, labels, SIMPLIFY = FALSE)

# -------------------------------
# Step 3: Arrange plots in multipanel layout
# -------------------------------
num_cols <- 3 # number of columns
num_rows <- ceiling(length(plots_labeled) / num_cols)

# -------------------------------
# Step 4: Save as PNG
# -------------------------------
png("multipanel_HIST.png", width = 2000, height = num_rows * 500)  # height scales with rows
grid.arrange(grobs = plots_labeled, ncol = num_cols)
dev.off()

# -------------------------------
# Done! The figure is saved as multipanel_HIST.png
# -------------------------------

```
